name: Jura (France)
description: Blue field strewn with gold billets and charged with a gold lion rampant crowned with red claws and tongue, over a red base with a white indented (saw-tooth) upper edge.
history: The crowned gold lion and billets are the arms of Franche-Comté, and the saw-tooth base alludes to the Jura mountains.

features.role: crowned lion of Franche-Comte over scattered billets
red base with white saw-tooth edge for the Jura mountains
